WELCOME TO MASINA HOSPITAL 

At Masina Hospital, technology and excellent medical care, blend in with our legacy of service and our passion for improving the quality of life.   We continue to undergo a complete modernization while still rooted in our values of selfless service, and moral and ethical standards.  Our website is a celebration of our vast multispecialty space and our holistic approach to medical care.

Leading Experts

Mumbai’s leading specialists are now part of our full-time roster and empanelled consultant network, strengthening clinical excellence across departments.

Advanced Technology

We continue to invest in cutting-edge medical technology and modern infrastructure to deliver accurate diagnosis and advanced treatment outcomes.

Holistic Care

With 40+ dedicated departments and multidisciplinary expertise, we provide integrated healthcare solutions under one roof.

Legacy of Trust

For 120 years, Masina Hospital has combined compassionate care, ethical medical practice and community service for generations of patients.
